title: cynometra longifolia
intro: Cynometra longifolia, also known as the 'Bagaroti' or 'Bagaroti tree', is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cynometra longifolia include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and manage diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and roots are used to make decoctions and infusions, which are consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
